title: rawhide: regression: checkpoint/restore: stdout went away
body:
Seeing this in rawhide:
```
[+1596s] not ok 546 podman checkpoint - basic test
...
<+320ms> # # podman container logs 0fade6f286f30b0e0370bbde48875a411e6325e3121b77048c9e23a1bae62512
...
         # #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
         # #|     FAIL: stdout went away after second restore (crun issue 756)
         # #| expected: -gt 14
         # #|   actual:     14
         # #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```

crun-1.8.4-1.fc39-x86_64 (compare to crun-1.8.3-2.fc38-x86_64).

https://github.com/containers/crun/issues/756

* rawhide : sys podman rawhide root host sqlite
  * PR #19270
    * [07-17 20:08](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4601645653295104/html/sys-podman-rawhide-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00546) in [sys] podman checkpoint - basic test
* rawhide : sys remote rawhide root host sqlite [remote]
  * PR #19267
    * [07-18 15:45](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4588932550098944/html/sys-remote-rawhide-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00546) in [sys] podman checkpoint - basic test

I realize this is a crun issue and will be refiled there. It is convenient for my flake-tracking to begin this as a podman issue.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
CI VMs have been bumped, rawhide crun is now `1.8.6-1.fc39-x86_64` (the bad one is 1.8.**4**). No instanced in my logs since 07-24. I'm calling this fixed.
